demo.name: Fast Travel Bell
description: Used to build fast-travel points.

demo.name: Lamp
description: A lamp that will illuminate even the deepest darkness.

demo.name: Insignia of a Blackbeard Crewman
description: Blackbeard's sailors' special insignia.
Turn them in on Tortuga to any faction of the archipelago to increase your reputation.

demo.name: Insignia of a Blackbeard Sergeant
description: Blackbeard's sergeants' special insignia.
Turn them in on Tortuga to any faction of the archipelago to increase your reputation.

demo.name: Insignia of a Blackbeard Lieutenant
description: Blackbeard's lieutenants' special insignia.
Turn them in on Tortuga to any faction of the archipelago to increase your reputation.

demo.name: Medicine
description: A crate with securely packed goods for easy transportation by sea.
Can be sold for piastres.
comment: Open it and you're out of the cut.

demo.name: Ancient Incense Burner
description: A rare artifact of an ancient people, preserved against all odds.

description: A crate with securely packed goods for easy transportation by sea.

demo.name: Closed Scallop Shell
description: It might contain a pearl.

demo.name: Bone Beads
description: A simple decoration of ancient peoples, made from bone and nuts.

demo.name: Wooden Talisman
description: A fish-shaped amulet. Ancient fishermen wore it to bring a richer catch.

demo.name: Clay Vase
description: A vase with a wavy pattern.
Corn seeds are stuck in the cracks.

demo.name: Tumbaga Ingot
description: An ancient alloy of copper and gold, discovered by the native peoples in ages past.
Required to ascend equipment.
